title: oxydectes hilarii
intro: Oxydectes hilarii is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, commonly known as the melastome family. It is also known as the "Bleeding Heart" due to its distinctive flowers that secrete a red sap. Oxydectes hilarii has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion, and its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins.
